message:
chore(beads): close MeshNodeConfig + ManifestSignature beads, advance ConnectorPlan ordering

Drift sync absorbing the parallel-agent transitions emitted while the
last few feature commits landed:

- flywheel_connectors-1aerk ("MeshNodeConfig defaults") closed; the
  feature + test landed in c12941e4e.
- flywheel_connectors-8tf1r ("ManifestSignature serde tag") closed;
  the enum + serde-matrix test landed in 55b6de3f3.
- flywheel_connectors-6tcjg ("ConnectorPlan ordering") moved
  open → in_progress (parallel agent picked up the next pin item).
- flywheel_connectors-4srrf ("ConsentToken hash determinism"),
  flywheel_connectors-8duqk ("OperationStatus serde tag matrix"), and
  flywheel_connectors-kjs08 ("PolicyRouter route-key derivation") show
  up as new / refreshed beads (still open) — the next slice of the
  pin queue.

Pure tracking sync — no source code, test code, or configuration
changes.
